calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wallis Lim for Minna Lim.

Mr. Lim explained why it took so long to get the estate to this point, why the property was left unproductive for so long and stated that there are no objections. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Report On Status Of Adminisrtration
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Report On Status Of Adminisrtration
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Continued To Sep-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Approval Of Report On Status Of Adminisrtration
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wallis Lim for petitioner.

Mr. Lim stated that the petition for final distribution has been prepared and that he is waiting for the inventory and appraisal to come back from the Probate Referee. Status on filing of inventory and appraisal, etc. was continued to August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed counsel that this will be the last continuance.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
